section.heading: Requirement of matching funds for fiscal years subsequent to first fiscal year of payments

paragraph.heading: In general
paragraph.chapeau: The Secretary may not make payments under section 300d–11(a) of this title unless the State involved agrees, with respect to the costs described in paragraph (2), to make available non-Federal contributions (in cash or in kind under subsection (b)(1)) toward such costs in an amount that—

subparagraph.content: for the second and third fiscal years of such payments to the State, is not less than $1 for each $1 of Federal funds provided in such payments for such fiscal years; and
for the fourth and subsequent fiscal years of such payments to the State, is not less than $2 for each $1 of Federal funds provided in such payments for such fiscal years.

paragraph.heading: Program costs
paragraph.chapeau: The costs referred to in paragraph (1) are—

subparagraph.content: the costs to be incurred by the State in carrying out the purpose described in section 300d–11(b) of this title; or
the costs of improving the quality and availability of emergency medical services in rural areas of the State.

content.p: The Secretary may not require a State to make non-Federal contributions as a condition of receiving payments under section 300d–11(a) of this title for the first fiscal year of such payments to the State.

subsection.heading: Determination of amount of non-Federal contribution
subsection.chapeau: With respect to compliance with subsection (a) as a condition of receiving payments under section 300d–11(a) of this title—

paragraph.content: a State may make the non-Federal contributions required in such subsection in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services; and

the Secretary may not, in making a determination of the amount of non-Federal contributions, include amounts provided by the Federal Government or services assisted or subsidized to any significant extent by the Federal Government.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2007—Pub. L. 110–23 amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to requirement of matching funds for fiscal years subsequent to first fiscal year of payments.
